top_signals.title: Freight Fraud Has Gone Corporate
top_signals.summary:
Freight fraud incidents are climbing by double digits year over year, and Reliance Partners breaks down how fraud has evolved and what to do about it.

The post Freight Fraud Has Gone Corporate appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
